sentence_reviews.text: Structured state-space models such as S4 parameterize long-memory linear dynamical systems so sequence convolution or recurrence scales to very long contexts.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Gu, Goel & Re S4 paper for structured state spaces, convolution/recurrence, long sequences, and spectral/state-space machinery.
